title: verbascum gilanicum
intro: Verbascum gilanicum, a perennial plant species in the figwort family, is native to the mountainous regions of Iran and Turkey. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Verbascum gilanicum can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
